title: valeriana dioica var. sylvatica
intro: Valeriana dioica var. sylvatica is a variety of valerian, a flowering plant native to Europe, known for its distinctive, sweet-scented flowers and medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its valerenic acid content, which has been shown to have anxiolytic, sedative, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of valerian include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from muscle and joint pain. Valerian root is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and supplements, to promote relaxation and promote a restful night's sleep.
